description: Composition Blue strap top made of 100% polyester, mid-thigh length, sleeveless with adjustable jeweled shoulder straps, loose shape with elasticated smocking to define waist, three rows of frills and short button placket at front top, mother-of-pearl buttons, top back is gathered to elasticated edging at top Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash on delicate cycle or dry clean No not bleach Do not tumble dry Cool iron The polyester fabric used for this funky top has a silky luster and when combined with the blue jewels on the shoulder straps, this top becomes a great party-wear option. Kept young and fresh with it's short length and loose Fit top, you could wear this over smart jeans or with sheer stockings and heels to dress it up. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
